title: Evil Reflections
description: A mysterious shadow follows you... This mod adds the Evil Reflection, a deadly mob that mimics your armor, i'll give you a tip, look around at night....
body:
"****A mysterious shadow follows you...****"

Evil Reflections is a chilling mod that brings new dangers to your world — starting with the Evil Reflection, a deadly mob that mimics your armor, your moves… and your silence.

These shadows spawn during the night and mirror your gear, making each encounter personal and unpredictable. Be warned: they don’t come alone, and they vanish just as mysteriously as they appear.

Some Features:

- ****Evil Reflection Mob****
A dark clone of yourself that appears at night, copying your armor and attacking without mercy.

- ****Dark Chest****
A mysterious chest that links itself to its placer. No matter who inserts items into it, ****all contents are instantly transferred to the player who placed the chest****.

- ****(From 1.0.0 and above) Dark Fragment****
Dropped by Evil Reflections. When held, this cursed fragment floats around you. If you take damage, it consumes the hit — ****disappearing and restoring 2 hearts instantly****.
